questions.prompt: An endpoint shows status Not Protected (red) in Managed AV but the customer says it's healthy. What's the most likely benign explanation?
choices: The endpoint is running a third-party AV with Defender disabled (Defender's status, not the endpoint's overall protection)
questions.explanation: Managed AV reports on Defender's status. A third-party AV that has Defender disabled produces Not Protected because Defender is not active, even though the endpoint may still be protected by the third-party product.

questions.prompt: In Audit Mode, Huntress applies Recommended Defaults to endpoints automatically.
questions.explanation: Audit Mode reports the current Defender configuration without modifying it. Recommended Defaults take effect at Account level only when Enforce Mode is on.
